summary: Comprehensive testing of SEO/GEO/AEO enhancements iteration 5 for JMLPH landing page. All new features verified: robots.txt accessible with proper content (Allow, Disallow /api/, Sitemap reference), sitemap.xml accessible with 15 URLs, 9 JSON-LD schemas (Organization, Periodical with 7 sameAs URLs, PublicationIssue, WebSite, BreadcrumbList, FAQPage, HowTo, WebPage with Speakable, ItemList), Most Read Articles section with 5 articles and correct view counts, semantic HTML improvements (<article>, <time>, <nav aria-label>), and visible 'Page last updated: March 17, 2026' in footer.
passed_tests: robots.txt accessible at /robots.txt with proper content (Allow, Disallow /api/, Sitemap reference)
sitemap.xml accessible at /sitemap.xml with proper XML structure and 15 URLs
JSON-LD: Organization schema with sameAs array (2 URLs)
JSON-LD: Periodical schema with sameAs array (7 URLs: DOAJ, Google Scholar, Crossref, OpenAlex, WorldCat, Sherpa Romeo, MIAR)
JSON-LD: WebSite schema with SearchAction present
JSON-LD: HowTo schema for manuscript submission (5 steps)
JSON-LD: WebPage schema with Speakable specification (5 CSS selectors)
JSON-LD: ItemList schema for Most Read Articles (5 items)
Total JSON-LD schemas: 9 script blocks in page head
Most Read Articles section displays 5 articles with correct view counts (365, 301, 202, 195, 191 reads)
Most Read articles are clickable links to jmlph.net
Most Read section has ItemList microdata attributes (itemScope, itemProp, itemType)
Article cards in Current Issue have article/ScholarlyArticle semantic markup (8 articles)
Published date uses semantic <time> element with datetime attribute
Footer shows 'Page last updated: March 17, 2026' with <time> element
Footer navigation wrapped in <nav> with aria-label='Footer navigation'
FAQ section accordion expand/collapse working correctly
Footer present with policy modal buttons
critical_code_review_comments: Note: Main agent mentioned 10 JSON-LD schemas but there are actually 9 distinct schema blocks in index.html. This is correct - Organization, Periodical, PublicationIssue, WebSite, BreadcrumbList, FAQPage, HowTo, WebPage (with Speakable), ItemList.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All SEO/GEO/AEO features verified in iteration 5. 9 JSON-LD schemas present: Organization (with 2 sameAs URLs), Periodical (with 7 sameAs URLs including DOAJ, Google Scholar, Crossref, OpenAlex, WorldCat, Sherpa Romeo, MIAR), PublicationIssue (with 8 ScholarlyArticles), WebSite (with SearchAction), BreadcrumbList (3 items), FAQPage (8 Q&As), HowTo (5 steps for manuscript submission), WebPage (with Speakable specification for 5 CSS selectors), ItemList (5 Most Read articles). robots.txt and sitemap.xml both accessible. Most Read section between Current Issue and Submission with 5 articles showing view counts (365, 301, 202, 195, 191). Semantic HTML: <main> element, <article> with ScholarlyArticle itemType, <time> elements with datetime, <nav> with aria-labels. Footer shows 'Page last updated: March 17, 2026'. All policy modals working. All existing features intact.
